items.title: Welcome Reception at Tradewinds Sirata Beach Resort
Technical Session: Field MS Systems (Royal Palm Ballroom)
Welcoming Remarks: Peter Betzer, Tim Short

talks.title: "Detection of Gas Phase Chemical Warfare Agents using Field-Portable Gas Chromatography-Mass Spectrometry Systems: Instrument and Sampling Strategy Considerations” Philip A. "Transportable Miniature FTMS for Analysis of Corrosives and Chemical Warfare Agents” Wayne Rimkus, Dean Davis and Kenneth Gallaher, Siemens Applied Automation, Austin, TX.

“A Small, Rugged, Autonomous Mass Spectrometer System for Environmental Analysis” C. “Real-time Monitoring of Aquatic Environments with an Underwater Mass Spectrometer.” P.G. Wenner, F.H.W. van Amerom, J.E. Edkins, S.K. Toler, K. Koehn, R. J. Bell, M.L. Hall and R.T. Short, Center for Ocean Technology, University of South Florida, St. Petersburg, FL.
Evening Free
